description: Pattern legend swatch rendering end-to-end: an ordinal fill scale mixing named pattern wrappers (with foreground colors) and a plain color, with a fill legend. Proves legend-symbol items receive the same pattern-wrapper objects as the chart marks, resolved to swatch-fit (objectBoundingBox) defs distinct from the marks' own (userSpaceOnUse) defs. A bound repeat signal exercises the repeat common property on named (non-image) patterns: repeat 'x'/'y'/false switches the marks to single-axis or single-tile fills (mark-anchored by default).

range.signal: [{pattern: {name: 'diagonal-stripe', foreground: '#4c78a8', repeat: repeatValue}}, {pattern: {name: 'circles', foreground: '#f58518', repeat: repeatValue}}, '#54a24b']
